suggested_fix: Add --- frontmatter with name and description fields.

description: First line inside frontmatter is '# officecli: v1.0.24'; AionUi regex YAML parser (/^---\s*\n([\s\S]*?)\n---/) silently drops the skill — it never appears in Skills Center.
suggested_fix: Move the version comment to a line below the --- opener, or replace with a 'version:' YAML field.

description: First line inside frontmatter is '# officecli: v1.0.24'; AionUi regex YAML parser silently drops the skill.
suggested_fix: Move the version comment outside the --- block or replace with 'version:' field.

description: First line inside frontmatter is '# officecli: v1.0.23'; additionally the string '# officecli: v1.0.23' is repeated 7+ times in the body as section separators, cluttering the document.
suggested_fix: Remove version comment from frontmatter; replace body version separators with standard markdown headings.

description: Agent context declares no model tier; Claude will default to session model.
suggested_fix: Add 'model: haiku' or 'model: sonnet' to frontmatter.

description: Agent context has zero example interaction blocks; Claude has no behavioral template to follow.
suggested_fix: Add at least one <user>/<assistant> example block illustrating expected interaction.

description: Agent context specifies no output format; Claude's response structure will be unpredictable.
suggested_fix: Add an ## Output section describing expected response shape.

description: Agent context declares no model tier.
suggested_fix: Add 'model: haiku' or 'model: sonnet' to frontmatter.

description: Agent context has zero example interaction blocks.
suggested_fix: Add at least one example block.

description: Agent context specifies no output format.
suggested_fix: Add an ## Output section.

description: Command has no allowed-tools declaration; Claude selects tools unconstrained.
suggested_fix: Add 'allowed-tools: Bash, Read, Write' (or actual required tools) to frontmatter.

description: Command uses $ARGUMENTS but has no guard for the empty-input case; behavior on bare invocation is undefined.
suggested_fix: Add an explicit check at top: if [ -z "$ARGUMENTS" ]; then echo 'Usage: ...'; exit 1; fi

description: 'appropriate' used twice as a vague qualifier (e.g., 'appropriate format', 'appropriate structure').
suggested_fix: Replace with the specific format or structure name.

description: 'various' used once in skill description without specifying the set.
suggested_fix: List the specific animation types rather than 'various'.

description: 'properly' and 'correctly' each used once in workflow instructions.
suggested_fix: Replace with verifiable success criteria (e.g., 'exits 0', 'output file exists').

description: 'properly' and 'various' each used once in workflow instructions.
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete success conditions.

description: 'properly' and 'various' each used once.
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete success conditions.

description: 'properly' and 'various' each used once.
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete success conditions.

description: Command hardcodes /Users/veryliu/Documents/GitHub/officecli/ as the OfficeCLI source directory; broken on all non-author machines.
suggested_fix: Replace with $OFFICECLI_DIR env var or a relative path anchored to a configured workspace root.

description: Command documents the officecli frontmatter YAML comment bug as a known issue but the 7 affected SKILL.md files remain unpatched, creating a persistent mismatch between documentation and codebase state.
suggested_fix: Fix the 7 OfficeCLI SKILL.md files to remove the frontmatter comment, then update or remove the workaround note in the command.

description: Both agent context files under examples/hello-world-extension/agents/ lack frontmatter, suggesting the example was not updated when the frontmatter convention was adopted; contributors using this as a template will produce non-conforming agents.
suggested_fix: Add minimal frontmatter to both example agent files and note the convention in the example's README.
